gold_change_reason: The seed solution did not handle extensionless files (content detection), YAML comments, or randomized filenames. The scaled operators D, C, and A require these capabilities.
covered_requirements: Handle richer input/data variants (extensionless files, YAML comments).
Satisfy new boundary/edge-case constraints (duplicates, comment skipping).
implementation_notes: Modified parse_exchange_yaml_file to skip lines starting with '#', enabling comment handling.
Added fallback content-based format detection when extension is not recognized: checks for tab or colon in first line.
Preserved duplicate entry handling; no filtering of duplicates.
No hardcoded paths; uses uuid-based filenames as in scaled case.
